title: balania henryi
intro: Balania henryi, also known as the Henry's Balania or Balania henryi, is a plant species in the family Sapotaceae, native to tropical forests in Queensland, Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine, with reported medicinal properties including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Balania henryi are thought to include its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain, as well as its antiseptic properties which can aid in wound healing and prevent infections. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's bark and leaves are often used to make infusions or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
